title: Monetary policy, strategy and implementation
summary: This is a navigation/listing page from the ECB's website that catalogs broad research topic categories rather than containing actual research findings, data, or actionable macro catalysts. No URL or publication date provided.
key_points: ECB research focuses on monetary policy transmission channels across households, firms, and banks
Research addresses side effects of prolonged accommodative monetary policy including asset prices and inequality
Forward guidance effectiveness is a key research area for central banks
The effective lower bound (ELB) constraint is a major focus of research on the 'new normal'
Policy normalisation considerations are part of current ECB research agenda
Climate change implications for monetary policy transmission and implementation are emerging research areas
